evidence.exact_quote: Ken Rice received a call through a friend's referral from Dr. Tom Limperis (a professor at the University of Michigan).
evidence.author: vasant.shanbhogue@enron.com

evidence.exact_quote: Dr. Limperis has developed a statistical database management system he would like to show Enron.
evidence.author: vasant.shanbhogue@enron.com

evidence.exact_quote: Please, CC-mail me Tom's number.
evidence.author: vasant.shanbhogue@enron.com

evidence.exact_quote: Dr. Limperis has developed a statistical database management system he would like to show Enron.
evidence.author: vince.kaminski@enron.com

evidence.exact_quote: I would like to call your attention to Rusty Parks, who is an MBA student here and has been serving as my research assistant since last fall.
evidence.author: vince.kaminski@enron.com

evidence.exact_quote: Rusty is a very outstanding individual with a very impressive work ethic and interest in topics such as financial engineering and technology, particularly as these issues pertain to the energy industry.
evidence.author: vince.kaminski@enron.com

evidence.exact_quote: If there is any possibility that you could meet with him during his visit, I am sure that he would be most grateful.
evidence.author: vince.kaminski@enron.com

evidence.exact_quote: I would like to call your attention to Rusty Parks, who is an MBA student here and has been serving as my research assistant since last fall.

evidence.exact_quote: I am sending you, as promised, the copies of my presentation.
evidence.author: j.kaminski@enron.com

evidence.exact_quote: My associate, Zimin Lu, will speak in my place in New York.
evidence.author: j.kaminski@enron.com

evidence.exact_quote: I put forth a non-binding offer, after discussing it further with Bobby, based on the information I had that appears to position us close to our competitors offers.

evidence.exact_quote: After meeting with Cairn today in Delhi, my perception is that our offer was received well.
evidence.author: vince.kaminski@enron.com

evidence.exact_quote: I am glad to hear that Shane Green is working there and doing so well.

evidence.exact_quote: I shall be glad to speak at the Gamma Iota Sigma dinner.
